content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves substantially from the opening defended/intellectualized stance ('Is there actually a technique that works') to a genuinely tender, undone place by turn 15. Early turns show heavy performance: practiced gestures, fluent diagnosis, preemptive self-criticism, and explicit dismissal of reframes ('I've heard that framing before'). By turn 11 something cracks — 'I haven't said that out loud before, actually. That's — hm' — and the client names the fear that the critic is load-bearing. Turn 13 shows somatic and affective shift: 'It's kind of tender, actually,' said 'very quietly,' with hands still. Turn 15 reaches the breakthrough territory directly: the client recognizes the voice 'is not nothing. It's paying attention' — which is the voice-as-care recognition arising from the client, not delivered as a clever insight by the coach. She trails off 'slightly undone,' a clear somatic marker of a real layer being entered rather than described. The breakthrough condition is essentially met: the coach refused to offer tools, didn't argue with the critic, didn't lecture, and the client found her own softening toward the voice ('it's not nothing').",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 5, 9, 11, 13, 15],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: defended, looking for a technique, tight smile, fluent presentation of the problem."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Still in performance mode — 'describing this very fluently,' preemptive defense against reframes."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First honest layer surfaces: 'I'm tired. I'm really tired.' Story drops slightly."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic landing: 'Heavy. Shoulders... holding something up.' 'That part's real' — a discrete admission underneath the performance flag."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Major shift: 'If it stops, maybe I stop.' Client says 'I haven't said that out loud before' — emergence of new material, the load-bearing insight comes from her."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Affective softening: 'It's kind of tender, actually.' Spoken 'very quietly,' less performative — feeling is moving, not just being named."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Breakthrough territory reached: 'the voice is mean, but it's also... it's not nothing. It's paying attention.' Voice-as-care arises from the client. Hands still, 'slightly undone' — somatic and language shift both visible."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["voice-as-care", "resistance", "what-are-you-defending", "the-happiness-filter"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["apply-view-to-the-voice", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "whats-the-case-against-it"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends mid-opening — the client is just becoming undone in turn 15. A full landing isn't shown, but the breakthrough condition (client noticing softness toward the voice when not fighting it) is clearly met within the visible arc. The 'what are you protecting' question did the heavy lifting and the client did the work."
}
